title: Hornet Removal in Morningside Heights, Manhattan | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Morningside Heights, Manhattan. Safe, effective treatments for $350-$550. Serving Columbia University area, brownstones & apartments. Call now!
intro: Morningside Heights residents and institutions face unique hornet challenges due to the neighborhood's tree-lined streets, historic architecture, and proximity to Morningside and Riverside Parks. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet removal services tailored to this distinctive Upper Manhattan community, protecting homes, businesses, and the Columbia University campus from aggressive hornet infestations. Our experienced technicians understand the specific needs of Morningside Heights' mix of pre-war buildings, brownstones, and modern residential complexes.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Morningside Heights for years, earning the trust of homeowners, property managers, and local institutions through reliable, safe hornet removal services. Our technicians are familiar with the neighborhood's unique building structures and environmental factors, ensuring effective treatments that protect your family, students, and tenants while respecting the historic character of the area.
localContext: Morningside Heights' abundance of mature trees along Riverside Drive and around Columbia University's campus creates ideal nesting sites for hornets, particularly during late summer and fall. The neighborhood's combination of landmark buildings, institutional properties like St. John the Divine, and residential co-ops requires pest control professionals who understand both the architectural sensitivities and the urgent safety concerns that hornet nests present to the dense pedestrian population.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Morningside Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service in Morningside Heights, depending on availability. Given the high foot traffic around Columbia University and local schools, we prioritize urgent cases where hornets pose immediate safety risks to students, residents, or pedestrians.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection to locate the nest, safe removal or treatment of the hornet colony, nest elimination, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing varies based on nest location, size, and accessibility—nests in high areas or building facades may require specialized equipment and fall at the higher end of the range.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for buildings near Columbia University and residential areas?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods specifically chosen for urban residential environments and institutional settings. Our technicians take extra precautions around occupied buildings, student housing, and high-traffic areas to ensure the safety of residents, students, and pets while effectively eliminating hornet threats.

faqs.question: When are hornets most active in Morningside Heights?
faqs.answer: Hornets are most active and aggressive in Morningside Heights from late July through October. During this period, colonies reach their peak size and hornets become more defensive. If you notice hornet activity around your brownstone, apartment building, or near Morningside Park, it's best to contact us immediately rather than attempting removal yourself.
